_purpose: JSON Schema for the canonical-hooks file written by the Phase 2 Frida probe. Captures de-obfuscated class/method/field names that drift between Snap versions.
title: SnapCanonicalHooks

schema_version.description: Fixed schema tag. Bump only on breaking shape changes.

snap_version.description: Snap APK version this hooks bundle was extracted from.

extracted_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the Frida-probe extraction run.

hooks.description: De-obfuscated symbol map. Keys are stable across versions; values are the Snap-version-specific obfuscated identifiers.

kiib_zck_class.description: FQCN of the KIIB-ZCK signing class (Snap-internal obfuscated).

kiib_zck_method_g.description: Method name on kiib_zck_class that applies the signature.

kiib_zck_method_h.description: Method name on kiib_zck_class that derives the nonce.

m0l_class.description: FQCN of the M0L opaque-registration class.

m0l_field_id_tag.description: Protobuf field tag for the registration ID.

m0l_field_status_tag.description: Protobuf field tag for the registration status.

m0l_field_payload_tag.description: Protobuf field tag for the registration payload.

hlm_class.description: FQCN of the HLM attestation-finalizer class.

hlm_load_condition.description: Trigger / condition string for when hlm_class is loaded (e.g. register_with_username_password).

user_agent.description: Snap User-Agent header string for this version (e.g. Snapchat/13.89.0.5).

confidence.description: Phase 2 self-reported confidence in the extracted hook map.

validation_status.description: Phase 3 validation gate. pending = not yet validated; PASS = end-to-end register/login succeeded; FAIL = blocked.

validation_details.description: Freeform Phase 3 diagnostics (per-step results, error logs, screenshot paths, etc).
